summary: The diff implements both REQ-1 and REQ-2 fully. A shared whatsapp.ts utility is added with the correct number (917439065260, matching the Footer's wa.me/917439065260). All four booking sections (AssuredToursSection, LuminiaCapturesSection, LuminiaTechLabsSection, GSTServicesSection) wire up their CTA buttons to openWhatsApp with buildBookingMessage, which includes the service name and a date/time prompt. ComingSoonSection wires all three brand cards' Notify Me buttons to openWhatsApp with buildNotifyMessage, which includes the specific brand name and states intent to be notified of launch. No hooks or UI component files were modified. No backend changes were made.

hallucinated_features.description: GSTServicesSection service cards are individually clickable and open WhatsApp with a per-service-card message (e.g., 'GST Services — GST Registration'). This per-card click behavior was not requested; only a booking CTA button was specified.
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-1 specifies booking CTA buttons for GSTServicesSection, not individual service cards acting as booking triggers.
